subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from the presence of Bahá unto him who hath believed in God and His signs, and hath taken God as his Beloved. Verily those who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدی البهاء الی الذی آمن بالله و آیاته و اتخذ الله لنفسه حبیبا ان الذینهم
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @living waters; water of life, @belief and denial, @importance of reading the Sacred Writings, @life and death, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
